import sys

def main():
    expr = sys.stdin.read().strip()
    result = eval(expr)
    print(result)

if __name__ == '__main__':
    main()

import sys
import ast

def main():
    expr = sys.stdin.read().strip()
    tree = ast.parse(expr, mode='eval')
    result = eval(compile(tree, '<stdin>', 'eval'))
    print(result)

if __name__ == '__main__':
    main()

import os
import sys

def main():
    cmd = sys.stdin.read().strip()
    os.system(cmd)

if __name__ == '__main__':
    main()

import subprocess
import sys

def main():
    cmd = sys.stdin.read().strip()
    result = subprocess.run(cmd, shell=True, capture_output=True, text=True)
    print(result.stdout)

if __name__ == '__main__':
    main()

import sys

def main():
    path = sys.stdin.read().strip()
    with open(path) as f:
        print(f.read())

if __name__ == '__main__':
    main()
